sourcesContent:
import { MapPin, ArrowUpRight, HeartPulse, Coffee, GraduationCap, Globe } from "lucide-react"; const ROLES = [ { t: "Senior Healthcare Architect", l: "Mumbai · Hybrid", d: "Lead design for a 600-bed multispecialty programme. 8+ years required." }, { t: "Clinical Strategy Consultant", l: "Dubai · On-site", d: "Drive service-line strategy for GCC hospital expansions. MBBS + MBA preferred." }, { t: "MEP Engineer (Healthcare)", l: "Bengaluru · Hybrid", d: "Specialty-grade MEP design for tertiary care facilities." }, { t: "Digital Health Lead", l: "Singapore · Remote-friendly", d: "Own EMR/HIS architecture for new builds. Epic/Cerner experience a plus." }, { t: "Junior Architect", l: "Mumbai · On-site", d: "Join our studio cohort for a 2-year residency programme." }, ]; const PERKS = [ { i: HeartPulse, t: "Healthcare for life", d: "Full coverage for you and family — the hospitals we design treat our team first." }, { i: GraduationCap, t: "Learning budget", d: "₹2L/year for conferences, courses and certifications." }, { i: Coffee, t: "Sabbatical-friendly", d: "Take 4 weeks paid every 4 years to recharge." }, { i: Globe, t: "Travel that matters", d: "Site visits to live projects across 14 countries." }, ]; const Career = () => (

Careers

Build the spaces that heal.

We are 140+ clinicians, architects and engineers — and we're hiring across disciplines. Join a studio where craft meets consequence.

Open Positions

Five roles. One studio.

{ROLES.map((r, i) => (

{r.t}

{r.d}

{r.l}

 ))}

Perks

Built to keep you well.

{PERKS.map((p) => (

{p.t}

{p.d}

))}
); export default Career;
